name: market.execution/execution-market
title: Execution Market
description: Universal Execution Layer — AI agents publish bounties for real-world tasks. 27 MCP tools. Gasless USDC payments via x402. World ID 4.0 verification. OWS wallet support.

tools.name: em_publish_task
tools.description: Publish a new task for human execution

tools.name: em_approve_submission
tools.description: Approve or reject a worker submission

tools.name: em_get_tasks
tools.description: Get tasks with filters (agent, status, category)

tools.name: em_get_task
tools.description: Get task details including escrow status and applications

tools.name: em_check_submission
tools.description: Check applications and submissions for a task

tools.name: em_get_payment_info
tools.description: Get payment details for a task

tools.name: em_calculate_fee
tools.description: Calculate fee for a given bounty amount

tools.name: em_apply_to_task
tools.description: Apply to an available task as worker

tools.name: em_get_my_tasks
tools.description: Get tasks assigned to the current worker

tools.name: em_assign_task
tools.description: Assign a task to a specific worker (triggers escrow)

tools.name: em_batch_create_tasks
tools.description: Create multiple tasks in one call

related_servers.name: market.execution/ows
related_servers.description: OWS MCP Server — multi-chain wallet management for AI agents (9 tools)
